### Post by theharshone on 2008-04-05
Hi
Everytime I play a game that uses 800x600 as its resolution, my monitor goes black and says Signal out of range. What do I do?

---

### Post by Punkguyta on 2008-04-05
It doesn't say anything in that log about what resolution or refresh rate it was trying to put the monitor into, your most likely bet is that it was trying to push your monitor's refresh rate too high, and it will give you that problem with an lcd or a CRT monitor regardless, check your game's settings or config file for that.

---

### Post by ubuntu-freak on 2008-04-05
Have you run:
 
**sudo dpkg-reconfigure -phigh xserver-xorg**
 
and then selected 800x600 as one of your optional resolutions?
 
Nathan

---

### Post by theharshone on 2008-04-06
no. Thank you, I will try that.
